review_text: Lovely, they had a new cabins built on 2025. I was here for harvest 👍🏻. Graham is very helpful too
A small but neat caravan park with the cleanest amenities I’ve seen in a long time. Well worth the $20 per night concession. ($25 with no concession).
Good facilities, nice showers, less traffic than other places overnight. A pleasant stay overall. Graham was very helpful.
Great overnight stay p&w $20 per night

There is no site management at this site.
All bookings are done via the Erye Peninsula app.
The hotel has closed in this town and food choices are limited. However there is a cafe in town on the main street.
Easy to book online. Text message to let us know about codes etc, very helpful. Facilities clean. Perfect for a quiet overnight visit.
Well worth a visit especially if you value your own space and small groups of people.
Graham was helpful. Spacious caravan park. Bathroom was clean and tidy with nice hot water.  No grass but plenty of shade.  Good for a stop over.
Perfect rest stop,power water dump and hot showers for $20....bargain
We have been all over Eyer Peninsular this last 2 months and the facilities at Lock are just the best we have had.
Great friendly manager, Graeme who came to help with codes for bathrooms. Lovely new washing machine and clothes line too!
Stayed one night, happy to have a peaceful stopover,friendly people and bird life. Good amenities. Thank you Lions.
